title: Name Palette
description: Lightweight name customization mod providing a command to modify name color, prefix, and suffix.
body:
# Name Palette

Name Palette is a lightweight name customization mod providing a command to modify name color, prefix, and suffix, backed up using the `/team` command.

## Usage

- `/name color <color>` Set name color.
- `/name prefix <prefix>` Set name prefix.
- `/name suffix <suffix>` Set name suffix.
- `/name reset` Reset all changes.
